box.text: This is a deconstructued version of dk.transientreplace~ for the purposes of visualizing the playback and parameter relationships.
route signal bang start length speed curve symmetry in out incurve outcurve replace
Modified version of gen.trapezoid example. Tweaked by Pete Dowling
if "exponent" == 0, curve is fixed 's-curve', else curve is given exponent; 1 = linear
if "downexponent" == 0, curve is fixed 's-curve', else curve is given exponent; 1 = linear
if "upexponent" == 0, curve is fixed 's-curve', else curve is given exponent; 1 = linear
